name: Kirovohrad Oblast (Ukraine)
description: A yellow field (with red) charged centrally with the central ornamental cipher.
history: Designed by Vitaliy Kryvenko and Kostiantyn Shliakhovyi and adopted on 29 July 1998. Kirovohrad Oblast lies in central Ukraine in the heart of the Wild Fields steppe, historically traversed by Cossacks.

features.symbolism: the black-earth soil of central Ukraine
